cases.goal: Prove that answer-depth can trace approval-route generation, queue movement, and evidence-grounded patch safety on a Java workflow.
Prove that answer-depth generalizes to a different Java reasoning shape: lifecycle/status synchronization instead of approval-route generation.
startingSeams: service or handler method that triggers the lifecycle transition
entity fields that represent current lifecycle state
repository read/write seam for that state
listener/event/subscriber seam triggered by the transition
reset/retry/compensation seam that can rewrite the same state
